title: gitmap stats --json
description: Aggregated command-history stats emitted by `gitmap stats --json`. Top-level is a single object summarizing all commands plus an embedded `commands` array of per-command rows. Field order is contractual: totalCommands, uniqueCommands, totalSuccess, totalFail, overallFailRate, avgDurationMs, commands.

totalCommands.description: Total number of command invocations recorded.

uniqueCommands.description: Number of distinct command names recorded.

totalSuccess.description: Count of successful invocations across all commands.

totalFail.description: Count of failed invocations across all commands.

avgDurationMs.description: Mean invocation duration across all commands, in milliseconds.

commands.description: Per-command stats rows. Field order within each row is contractual: command, totalRuns, successCount, failCount, failRate, avgDurationMs, minDurationMs, maxDurationMs, lastUsed.

lastUsed.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent invocation.
